name: Mobile Mode - mobile on desktop (inline button)
description: Adds an inline, on-page floating button to toggle mobile on desktop (no popup). Chrome/Edge: true DevTools-style device reflow via the debugger API. Firefox: switches the User-Agent so UA-sniffing sites (Facebook, YouTube) serve their mobile site - for true reflow of any site use Firefox's built-in Responsive Design Mode (Ctrl+Shift+M), since Firefox gives extensions no viewport-emulation API.
